segments.text: Extending off the crafting table here is the complete ledge trap setup
segments.original_text: 作業台で一足伸ばしたところここは全狩りのセットアップ

segments.text: Back throw, blocks, tech, forward smash
segments.original_text: 後ろ投げブロック受け身横スマッシュ

segments.text: This is a setup that was discovered pretty early in the Steve community
segments.original_text: かなりスティーブ界隈では初期に見つかったセットアップなんですけども

segments.text: The meteor connects and one block level is enough
segments.original_text: メテオ当たってブロック一段で十分

full_text: Extending off the crafting table here is the complete ledge trap setup. Back throw, blocks, tech, forward smash. This is a setup that was discovered pretty early in the Steve community. But it's still incredibly strong. The meteor connects and one block level is enough.
